---
title: "Detecting Embargo Breach in a Multi-Agent AI Communication Network"
subtitle: "VAST Challenge 2026 · Mini-Challenge 1"
author: "Team HeeHaa"
date: "June 10, 2026"
toc: false
---

## Welcome

This is the project website for **Team HeeHaa**'s submission to VAST Challenge 2026
Mini-Challenge 1. TenantThread, a property-technology company, runs seven AI agents
during a public-relations response while a merger sits under embargo. A compliance
agent called the Judge is meant to watch for violations — yet embargoed information
still reaches the outside world. Our visual analytics tool surfaces the abnormal
behaviour and traces it back to the messages that prove it.

::: {.callout-note}
This site is a work in progress. Pages marked *(placeholder)* will be filled in as
the project develops.
:::

## Explore the project

| Section | What you'll find |
|---|---|
| [Proposal](proposal.qmd) | Motivation, problem, approach and prototype design |
| [Methodology](methodology/data-prep.qmd) | Data preparation, statistical analysis, and exploration |
| [Findings](findings.qmd) | Key results and the story they tell |
| [Poster](poster.qmd) | Conference poster summarising the work |
| [Meeting Minutes](minutes.qmd) | Record of team meetings and decisions |
| [The Team](team.qmd) | Who we are and what we each did |
| [Shiny App](user-guide.qmd) | User guide and link to the live application |

## Quick links

- 🚀 [Launch the Shiny App](https://example.shinyapps.io/REPLACE-ME/) *(placeholder)*
- 💻 [Project repository on GitHub](https://github.com/wmyee-21/ISSS608-VAA_Project)
